# AgentSearch vendor (brcrusoe72/agent-search)
#
# Self-hosted search API for the AI Co-founder.
# Source: https://github.com/brcrusoe72/agent-search
#
# Setup (requires Docker Desktop):
#   1. npm run agent-search:prepare
#   2. npm run agent-search:up
#   3. curl http://127.0.0.1:3939/search?q=startup+funding
#
# Without Docker, the app falls back to DuckDuckGo Instant Answer.
